content.body: Bit of a long shot here, but is anyone looking for a principal/senior staff JS engineer? I’m thinking about moving on from my current role, and I’d really like to work somewhere that I could have _slightly_ more time to actually work on decorators (which wouldn’t be hard, I currently have zero time, and I have to crunch and work overtime enough that I don’t have energy on my own time 🫠)
